---
title: "Lipidomics Machine Learning"
author: "alexander-gysin (alexander.gysin@usz.ch)"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

Still working on it...

```{r setup_boxes, include=FALSE}
source(here::here("code", "00_config.R"))
```

# Setup and Import
`r what_this_does("Loaded ML frameworks including glmnet, randomForest, and xgboost.", "Imported global matrices and clinical metadata.", "Sourced the Tiered ML Engines.")`

```{r setup_and_import, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(here)
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(randomForest)
library(xgboost)
library(smotefamily)
library(pROC)
library(kableExtra)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

# Output paths
current_file <- "05_machine_learning"
output_dir_data <- here::here("output", current_file)
if (!dir.exists(output_dir_data)) dir.create(output_dir_data, recursive = TRUE)

assets_dir <- here::here("docs", "assets", current_file)
if (!dir.exists(assets_dir)) dir.create(assets_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Source Configuration & ML Engines
source(here::here("code", "04_ml_engines.R"))

# Load Data
master_spine <- readRDS(here::here("output", "01b_clinical_feature_engineering", "curated_clinical_spine.rds"))
lipid_mat <- readRDS(here::here("output", "01a_data_import_and_qc", "raw_lipid_matrix.rds"))
```

# Configurations
`r what_this_does("Configured the Nested Cross-Validation global parameters and defined specific ML routing paths for omics contrasts, including hyperparameter grids for tuning.")`

```{r configurations}
# 1. Global ML Configurations ---------------------------
global_ml_configs <- list(
  cv = list(
    outer_folds = 5,   # Outer loop for unbiased evaluation
    inner_folds = 3,   # Inner loop for hyperparameter tuning / early stopping
    stratified = TRUE
  ),
  feature_stability_threshold = 0.80 # Feature must be selected in 80% of outer folds
)

# 2. ML Routing & Grids ---------------------------
ml_configs <- list(

  job_lipid_ssc_vs_ctrl = list(
    title = "SSc vs Control (Lipidomics)",
    omics_type = "lipidomics",
    dataset = "lipid_mat",
    test_var = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c("Active", "Non-Active"),
    ref_groups = c("Control"),
    use_smote = FALSE, # SMOTE disabled for sparse/hybrid data
    algorithms = c("lasso", "rf", "gb", "plsda"),
    hyperparameters = list(
      lasso = list(alpha = 1), # 1 = LASSO, 0.5 = Elastic Net
      rf    = list(ntree = 500),
      gb    = list(max_depth = 2, eta = 0.01, nrounds = 200),
      plsda = list(ncomp = 2)
    )
  ),

  job_prot_ssc_vs_ctrl = list(
    title = "SSc vs Control (Proteomics)",
    omics_type = "proteomics",
    dataset = "prot_mat",
    test_var = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c("Active", "Non-Active"),
    ref_groups = c("Control"),
    use_smote = TRUE, # SMOTE enabled for dense continuous data
    algorithms = c("lasso", "rf", "gb", "plsda"),
    hyperparameters = list(
      lasso = list(alpha = 0.5), # Using Elastic Net for highly correlated proteins
      rf    = list(ntree = 500),
      gb    = list(max_depth = 3, eta = 0.01, nrounds = 300),
      plsda = list(ncomp = 3)
    )
  )
)
```

# Machine Learning {.tabset}
`r what_this_does("Executes the Universal ML Loop across defined omics contrasts. Handles omics-specific preprocessing (Hybrid binarization vs. SMOTE imputation), trains stratified nested CV models, and compiles unified evaluation metrics.")`

```{r machine_learning, results='asis'}
# Global storage for aggregated metrics
compiled_metrics <- list()

for (job_id in names(ml_configs)) {
  job <- ml_configs[[job_id]]
  target_mat <- get(job$dataset)

  cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s {.tabset}\n\n", job$title))

  # 1. Tier 1: Data Preparation Worker
  prep_res <- tryCatch({
    wrap_ml_data_prep(mat = target_mat, clin_df = master_spine, config = job)
  }, error = function(e) return(list(status = "error", msg = e$message)))

  if (!is.null(prep_res$status) && prep_res$status == "error") {
    cat(sprintf("**Data Prep FAILED:** %s\n\n", prep_res$msg))
    next
  }

  X_clean <- prep_res$X
  Y_clean <- prep_res$Y

  cat(sprintf("*Successfully compiled %d Samples and %d Features for modeling.*\n\n", nrow(X_clean), ncol(X_clean)))

  job_metrics <- data.frame()

  # 2. Tier 1: Algorithm Loop
  for (alg in job$algorithms) {
    cat(sprintf("\n\n### %s\n\n", toupper(alg)))

    # Execute Universal Engine
    ml_res <- wrap_ml_engine(
      X = X_clean,
      Y = Y_clean,
      config = job,
      global_config = global_ml_configs,
      algorithm = alg,
      job_name = job_id,
      out_dir = output_dir_data,
      assets_dir = assets_dir,
      project_colors_func = get_project_colors
    )

    # Accumulate Metrics
    job_metrics <- bind_rows(job_metrics, ml_res$metrics)

    # Render Output Metrics Table
    tbl <- ml_res$metrics %>%
      kableExtra::kbl(format = "html") %>%
      kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
    print(tbl)
    cat("\n\n")

    # Render Plots side-by-side if both exist
    if (!is.null(ml_res$roc_plot) && !is.null(ml_res$stability_plot)) {
      if (interactive()) {
        print(ml_res$roc_plot + ml_res$stability_plot)
      } else {
        cat(sprintf("<div style='display: flex;'>"))
        cat(sprintf("<img src='assets/%s/%s_%s_ROC.png' width='45%%' style='margin-right: 5%%;'/>", current_file, job_id, alg))
        cat(sprintf("<img src='assets/%s/%s_%s_Stability.png' width='45%%' />", current_file, job_id, alg))
        cat(sprintf("</div>\n\n"))
      }
    } else if (!is.null(ml_res$roc_plot)) {
       if (interactive()) { print(ml_res$roc_plot) }
       else { cat(sprintf("<img src='assets/%s/%s_%s_ROC.png' width='50%%' />\n\n", current_file, job_id, alg)) }
    }

    cat("\n\n")
  }

  compiled_metrics[[job_id]] <- job_metrics

  # Clean memory inside outer loop
  rm(X_clean, Y_clean, prep_res, job_metrics)
  gc()
}
```

<!-- # Appendix -->
<!-- `r what_this_does("Appended the raw underlying R code from the ML engines to the HTML report's appendix to ensure complete analytical transparency and reproducibility.")` -->

<!-- ```{r print_engine, code=readLines(here::here("code", "01_general_engines.R")), eval=FALSE} -->

<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r complete} -->
<!-- cat("Script 04c Complete! \n") -->
<!-- ``` -->
